1. Physical Education Overview, Director and Assistant Director Profiles
Chunk ID: msajce_sports_chunk_01 | URL: https://www.msajce-edu.in/sports.php | ~410 tokens
Overview of MSAJCE's Department of Physical Education with its philosophy, and full profiles of the Director and Assistant Director of
Physical Education including qualifications and contact.
Department of Physical Education  MSAJCE
Sports activities are given utmost importance as it makes the student physically strong and increases stamina and strength.
MSAJCE has created necessary sports and games facilities for the students to strengthen physical education. Since sports and
games play an integral part in molding and refining the character of an individual. Studies have shown that exercise and sport
activities increase the blood flow to the brain and help in increased concentration, stimulate creativity, develop better problem
solving methods and enable quick learning methods.
Director of Physical Education:
Name: Dr. K. P. SANTHOSH NATHAN
Qualification: B.P.E.S., B.P.Ed., M.P.Ed., M.Phil., Ph.D
E-Mail: ped.santhosh@msajce-edu.in
Assistant Director of Physical Education:
Name: Mr. M. Janakiraman
Qualification: B.Sc., M.P.Ed., NSNIS (Cricket)
Department Objectives:
(cid:127) 1. To provide an opportunity through talent identification
(cid:127) 2. To develop identified talent to excel at inter collegiate, University, inter-university levels
(cid:127) 3. To bring a unique culture throughout the MSAJCE in order to promote physical fitness, talent identification, competitiveness
and brotherhood

2. Sports Quota Scholarship and Sports Facilities Available
Chunk ID: msajce_sports_chunk_02 | URL: https://www.msajce-edu.in/sports.php | ~420 tokens
Details of the sports quota scholarship for district, state and national level participants, and the complete list of 11 sports and games
facilities available at MSAJCE.
Sports Quota Scholarship:
The college encourages SPORTS ENTHUSIASTS by rendering admission through Sports Quota and also by offering
scholarship to District, State and National level participants. The college provides sports quota admission and scholarship
support for outstanding athletes at district, state, and national levels.
Sports Facilities and Games Available at MSAJCE:
The college has excellent infrastructure required for development of sports skills in students. The following sports and games
facilities are available:
(cid:127) 1. Basketball
(cid:127) 2. Football
(cid:127) 3. Cricket and Cricket Nets
(cid:127) 4. Yoga

3. Fitness Centre  Gymnasium Equipment List
Chunk ID: msajce_sports_chunk_03 | URL: https://www.msajce-edu.in/sports.php | ~360 tokens
Details of the well-equipped indoor gymnasium at MSAJCE open to all students and faculty, including the complete list of 14 categories
of gym equipment available.
Fitness Centre  Gymnasium:
There is a well-equipped gymnasium for all the students and faculties with the latest equipment in the well laid out in-door Gym.
To encourage the Weight lifters, Body builders and Fitness seekers, the following equipment for the above purpose are made
available.
List of Gymnasium Equipment:
Fitness Centre  List of Gymnasium Equipment
Equipment (Column A) Equipment (Column B)
Multi Gym Leg Extension
Preacher Curl Bench Multi Adjustable Bench Press
Cable Cross Over Machine Sitting and Standing Twister
Leg Press Spin Bike
Round Dumbbells (Rubberised) Rubber Weight Plates
Olympic Curl Bar Olympic Weight Lifting Bar
Chrome Push Up Bar Triceps Rope
